query: SELECT id, name, email, role, team, loginMethod, lastSignedIn, CASE WHEN passwordHash IS NULL THEN 'NULL' WHEN passwordHash = '' THEN 'EMPTY' ELSE 'SET' END as passwordStatus FROM users WHERE email = 'takashimoriwaki@kokoronohinata.com';
